executives.name: Wayne Heili
executives.background: Mr. Heili has spent over 30 years in the uranium mining industry. He previously served as President and CEO of Ur-Energy Inc. and held various operations and engineering roles at the Smith Ranch-Highland ISR uranium project.

tenure_dates.title: Managing Director and Chief Executive Officer

executives.name: Rachel Rees
executives.background: Ms. Rees is a Fellow of the Governance Institute of Australia and a Graduate of the Australian Institute of Company Directors. She has over 25 years of experience in senior executive roles in multinational listed and unlisted companies.

tenure_dates.title: Chief Financial Officer and Joint Company Secretary

executives.name: Jon Winter
executives.background: Mr. Winter has over 30 years of experience in the uranium industry, specifically in ISR operations. He has held senior management positions with Uranium One and Power Resources.

executives.name: Ralph Knode
executives.background: Mr. Knode has over 30 years of experience in the uranium industry, including senior roles at Uranium One and Cameco Corporation.

tenure_dates.title: Chief Executive Officer - Strata Energy Inc.

executives.name: Jonathan Whyte
executives.background: Mr. Whyte is a Chartered Accountant with over 25 years of experience in the resources sector. He has held various company secretarial and financial management roles.

board_of_directors.name: John Harrison
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Harrison has over 45 years of experience in the financial services, mining, and energy sectors. He was previously a Managing Director at Woodside Energy and has held senior roles at various investment banks.

board_of_directors.name: Wayne Heili
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Heili has spent over 30 years in the uranium mining industry. He previously served as President and CEO of Ur-Energy Inc. and held various operations and engineering roles at the Smith Ranch-Highland ISR uranium project.

board_of_directors.name: Mark Barker
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Barker has over 40 years of experience in the uranium industry, including senior roles at Cameco Corporation and Areva. He is a recognized expert in uranium marketing and contracting.

board_of_directors.name: Michelle Jenkins
board_of_directors.background: Ms. Jenkins is a Chartered Accountant with over 25 years of experience in the mining sector. She has held senior financial and executive roles at various mining companies, including Bullion Resources and Kumba Resources.

board_of_directors.name: Wally Graham
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Graham has over 35 years of experience in the mining and energy sectors, with a focus on project development and operations. He has held senior roles at various mining companies, including Rio Tinto and BHP.

sources.source_description: Official Company Website - Board and Management Page
